meaning: n.(阿拉伯或土耳其经选举产生的) 镇长,乡长
examples: At least, such schemes did not save Mr Mukhtar and other well-connected PML (Q) men from defeat.
There are Omar Mukhtar streets-benghazi has one-and there is an Omar Mukhtar University, in Bayda; his face is on one of the banknotes.
BJP's spokesman, Mukhtar Abbas Naqvi, stalwartly predicts a clear-cut victory for his party in all four.
He said Calcutta police should have checked with Indian-administered Kashmir police once they arrested Mr Mukhtar.
